parameters.query:
SELECT ap.*, 
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('entity_id', mid.entity_id, 'conversions_7d', SUM(mid.conversions), 'spend_7d', SUM(mid.spend)))
     FROM meta_insights_daily mid
     WHERE mid.date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
     GROUP BY mid.entity_id),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS recent_performance
FROM action_plans ap
WHERE ap.plan_id = $1 AND ap.status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL';
INSERT INTO approvals (plan_id, approver, decision) VALUES ($1, $2, $3);

additionalFields.queryParams: =[$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.plan_id, $('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.user, $('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.decision]

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO actions_executed (plan_id, entity_level, entity_id, action_type, meta_api_call, meta_api_response, status, executed_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, 'EXECUTED', NOW());
UPDATE action_plans SET status = 'EXECUTED' WHERE plan_id = $1;

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=✅ *Action Executed*
• Type: `{{$json.action_type}}`
• Entity: `{{$json.entity_name || $json.entity_id}}` ({{$json.entity_level}})
• Plan: `{{$json.plan_id}}`
• Approved by: {{$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.user}}

_To rollback: go to Meta Ads Manager and manually re-enable the entity, or set status back to ACTIVE via the API._

parameters.query: UPDATE action_plans SET status = 'REJECTED' WHERE plan_id = $1;

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =❌ Plan `{{$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.plan_id}}` rejected by {{$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.user}}. No changes made to Meta.
